Description.Name: Flea
Description.Details: Wrought by happy accident the Flea 26 is a bastardization of the Flea and the ultralight Flea variations. Why? because an entire run of the precious endosteel was made for the Oberon Confederation. It isn't that this rather lengthy run of structures was made that was the issue, but rather there was no quality control and none, not a single one of the structures was to spec. So instead of a new twenty ton Flea variant, 17.5 ton Fleas were delivered. Because the structure was non standard, so was everything else. With a small cockpit and a fragile Jury-rigged XL engine, backed by only 10 single heat sinks and paltry armor, it takes a skilled pilot to get the kind of performance from the mech that the great houses would consider acceptable - but pirates can't be too picky. On the up side, It's armed with one each of a Large, Medium, and Small lasers, providing reliable, ammo free firepower. Between it's speed and the large laser, it can often keep the range open with larger, more capable combatants. Pafftek Industries Sub-mod Designed by: Regalia

YangsThoughts: Wrought by happy accident the Flea 26 is a bastardization of the Flea and the ultralight Flea variations.  Why? because an entire run of the precious endosteel was made for the Oberon Confederation.  It isn't that this rather lengthy run of structures was made that was the issue, but rather there was no quality control and none, not a single one of the structures was to spec.   So instead of a new twenty ton Flea variant, 17.5 ton Fleas were delivered.   Because the structure was non standard, so was everything else. With a small cockpit and a fragile Jury-rigged XL engine, backed by only 10 single heat sinks and paltry armor, it takes a skilled pilot to get the kind of performance from the mech that the great houses would consider acceptable - but pirates can't be too picky. On the up side, It's armed with one each of a Large, Medium, and Small lasers, providing reliable, ammo free firepower. Between it's speed and the large laser, it can often keep the range open with larger, more capable combatants.
